en: Um, I was hoping to compile an admittedly rudimentary scrapbook of her life.
ko: 음, 그녀의 삶에 대한 기본적인 스크랩북을 만들고 싶었어요.

en: Something that Betsy could have and hold on to.
Well I suppose I could make a copy of it.
ko: 음, 복사본을 만들 수 있을 것 같아요.

en: Yeah, well, it's very nice meeting you, George.
Did you just double-dip that chip?

ko: 당신이 그 칩을 두 번 찍었어요! 두 번 찍었다고요?

en: What are you talking about? You dipped the chip.
You took a bite, and you dipped again.
ko: 한 입 베어 물고 다시 찍었어요.

en: That's like putting your whole mouth right in the dip!
ko: 그건 마치 입을 통째로 딥에 넣는 것과 같아요!
